code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_space
      if in_num
        let signed = if neg
          0 - val
        else
          val
        end
        let sq = signed * signed
        if first
          result = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{sq}"
        end
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      neg = true
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
end
